title: A golden offer Trump couldn't refuse: Dinner at the Palace of Versailles
shortDescription: Most astute gift givers to President Donald Trump have considered his love for gold.

title: 'Fake word': Trump, Democrats needle each other over 'affordability'
shortDescription: Trump blasted Democrats who complain about 'affordability' by arguing he inherited high inflation from Biden, but polls show worry over high prices.

title: Trump says U.S. oil prices are falling at G7
shortDescription: President Trump stated oil and gas prices are now dropping during remarks at the G7 Summit.

title: Trump threatens to continue bombing Iran
shortDescription: President Donald Trump spoke to reporters at the G7 summit, saying he will continue to bomb Iran if it doesn't abide by its agreement with the U.S.

shortDescription: President Donald Trump responds to questions on Iran school bombing, calling it a "mistake" and says investigation is ongoing.

title: Big Supreme Court rulings near on birthright citizenship, Trump power
shortDescription: The Supreme Court is preparing to issue final rulings on birthright citizenship, gun rights and more this month.

title: See Trump news today, June 17 as he speaks at G7 on Iran
shortDescription: Another Trump-backed candidate won a Georgia primary runoff. The Reflecting Pool is green again. Trump discusses the Iran deal at the G7 Summit.

title: Hillary Clinton says Biden's 2024 reelection bid cost Democrats
shortDescription: Hillary Clinton says Joe Biden made a "terrible mistake" by seeking reelection in 2024, arguing another Democrat could have beaten Trump.

title: Wahab advances in special election for Swalwell seat, reports say
shortDescription: Aisha Wahab leads the pack to serve the remainder of former Congressman Eric Swalwell's term, according to early results.

title: Moment: Trump jokes he is 'the boss' at G7
shortDescription: President Donald Trump jokes he is "the boss" at G7 summit in Évian les Bains while pitching Iran deal to global allies.

title: Trump pulls Clayton nomination for spy chief in spat with Democrats
shortDescription: Trump abruptly pulled his nominee for the country's spy chief, Jay Clayton, and accused Democrats of reneging on renewing a key surveillance law.

title: Who could replace Eric Swalwell? Latest on California special election
shortDescription: California voters weighed in on a replacement for Eric Swalwell.

title: After a fight over Trump's name on Kennedy Center, judge demands future plans
shortDescription: A federal judge ordered Trump to provide his plans for keeping the Kennedy Center open beyond July 5, after removing his name from the facade.

shortDescription: The US and Iran remotely signed a 14-point agreement that would put an end to the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Petition to rename road Trump Tower is on after Obama at 22k signatures
shortDescription: A tower in Chicago's town spells 'TRUMP' in big letters. A petition wants to change the road it's on to "Obama Ave." Is it possible?
